lines: A black field tag is pinned under a stone chip, the script cramped by rain and cave grit.
Wolf hair is caught in the cord. Red cloth fibers cling under the nail that holds it down.
Field order: do not skin the wolves. Burn the teeth. If the gums shine gold, burn the knife too.
A last hand added one line in a hurry: they bit the men with red cuffs outside. They came back wrong after the cave took them.
